title: What is the best way to connect information across boards?

posts.author: Gopikabalak85 (Kumar)
posts.cookedHtml: This allows you to automate board connections and connect items between boards based on triggers you define. For example +18447757389, you can connect items when assignees match, or match data between items on different boards. You can also create a two-way sync so that changes made on one board are automatically reflected on the other. @Ak Singh
